extraction.one_line_summary: BENNETT Sam won a reduced bunch sprint in Brignoles after crashes on final descent eliminated Kristoff and Ewan, following passive GC riding.
tactical_patterns: Mitchelton-Scott paced final categorized climb for Trentin despite no GC attacks, revealing sprinter team gambling on selection.
GC group actively slowed after crashes separated dropped riders, signaling gentlemen's agreement before queen stage preserving status quo.
Intermediate sprint at 4km saw Kwiatkowski take bonus seconds over Sanchez, suggesting Sky prioritizing tactical buffer over sprint energy.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Specifically targeted stage as Milan-Sanremo preparation while surviving Cat-2 climb, suggesting improved climbing form for monuments.
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: Dropped on category 2 climb before finale, exposing vulnerability on hillier sprint stages compared to Bennett.
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michal: positive: Contested intermediate sprint 4km from finish despite yellow jersey, showing Sky unwilling to cede even minor time gaps.
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: neutral: Team paced final climb for him but finished third, suggesting Mitchelton-Scott misjudged selection difficulty.
rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: negative: Dropped despite holding polka dots, revealing breakaway specialist unable to survive pace on classified stage finish.
